steps.title: Find the specific service
steps.content: The student wants an example of a public service Ixmiquilpan is responsible for. The notes identify water treatment as one service municipalities provide.

steps.title: Match service to place
steps.content: Choice A and Choice B mention public services only generally, without naming an example. Choice D gives population information. The best sentence connects Ixmiquilpan's municipal role to the specific service of water treatment. The answer is C.
